---
title: ""

---

<!-- --Websites -->
<!-- --Applications -->
<!-- - Sisma -->
<!-- - ScriptRplot -->
<!-- - JSPlotly -->

## Book

- Schneedorf, J.M. Bioquanti: Bringing content to life for basic education. In: Open Educational Resources at UNIFAL-MG. Org: Mafra, L.A.S; Silva, L.E; Schneedorf, J.M. Ed. Pimenta Cultural, 84p. 2025 (in press). 

- Schneedorf, J.M., Rodrigues, K.L. [Basic biochemistry of humans, animals, and plants](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.32623.55208). 353p., 2024. ISBN: 978-65-00-90366-9.

- Schneedorf, J.M. [Quantitative Biochemistry](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.36090.40644) & R. 152p., 2022. ISBN: 978-65-00-52125-2. .

- Schneedorf, J.M. [SISMA - Dynamic Visualization in Catalysis & Metabolism](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.25027.92964). 95p., 2022. ISBN: 978-65-00-52124-5.

- Schneedorf, J.M. [Structural Biochemistry Guided by Jmol](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.29268.10882). 145p., 2019. ISBN: 978-85-63473-42-4.

## Chapter


- Oliveira, G. A. V.; Lemes, N. H. T.; Sindra, L. V.; Schneedorf, J.M. Binding of Molecules Followed by Electroanalytical Techniques. In: Ana Clarissa dos Santos Pires; Luis Henrique Mendes da Silva. (Org.). Methods and Protocols in Food Science - Characterization of Molecular Interactions. 1st ed. New York: Springer Nature, 2025, v. 13, p. 1-12.

- Ferreira, M. P.; Galhardo, B. R.; Lemes, N. H. T.; Coelho, Y. L.; Schneedorf, J.M.; Sindra, L. V. Application of Quartz Crystal Microbalance to Study Intermolecular Interactions. In: Ana Clarissa dos Santos Pires; Luis Henrique Mendes da Silva. (Org.). Methods and Protocols in Food Science - Characterization of Molecular Interactions. 1st ed. New York: Springer Nature, 2025, v. 13, p. 29-38.

- Andrade, R. J.; Lemes, N. H. T.; Sindra, L. V.; Schneedorf, J.M. Difference Spectra Absorption Spectrophotometry Applied to Molecular Interactions. In: Ana Clarissa dos Santos Pires; Luis Henrique Mendes da Silva. (Org.). Methods and Protocols in Food Science - Characterization of Molecular Interactions. 1st ed. New York: Springer Nature, 2025, v. 13, p. 14-28. 

- Schneedorf, J.M. JSPlotly - a practical and portable application for interactive graphical simulations for reproducible teaching. In: Open Educational Resources at UNIFAL-MG. Org: Mafra, L.A.S; Silva, L.E; Schneedorf, J.M. Ed. Pimenta Cultural. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. ScriptRplot - an R script for producing elegant graphics with ggplot2. In: Open Educational Resources at UNIFAL-MG. Org: Mafra, L.A.S; Silva, L.E; Schneedorf, J.M. Ed. Pimenta Cultural. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. R and RStudio: a platform for implementing reproducible teaching. In: Active Learning: from Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Nogueira, M.G.F., Mafra, L.A.S., Silva, E.L. Garden of Molecules: a virtual catalog for reproducible teaching of atomic models in basic education. In: Active Learning: from Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. R packages for creating active learning objects in reproducible teaching. In: Active Learning: From Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Hornink, G.G. Development of Digital Skills in Higher Education Based on Project-Based Learning with R and Rstudio. In: Active Learning: From Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Silva, L.E., Alves, L.P.O., Vespucio, N.M.B., Schneedorf, J.M. Sisma, an application for simulating dynamic diagrams for teaching and learning and its adaptation to an online environment (SismaWeb). In: Active Learning: From Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Dynamic Documents in Reproducible Teaching with R & Rstudio. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Reproducible teaching as an active methodology in teaching and learning. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Rodrigues, B.S., Hornink, G.G. OIER - Interactive Objects in Reproducible Teaching: an approach with R. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Prompt literacy in the production of interactive teaching objects in reproducible teaching for R & RStudio. In: Reflections and Reports on Artificial Intelligence. Edited by Carolei, P., Rosalen, M. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Evaluation of AI assistants in the creation of R codes for interactive objects in reproducible teaching. In: Reflections and Reports on Artificial Intelligence. Edited by Carolei, P., Rosalen, M. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Silva, L.E., Lima, D.C., Isgrignero, I., França, J.G., Lage, R.M., Schneedorf, J.M., Mafra, L.A.S. Tales Ludos: improving the user experience 
in the development of online educational games. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Digital technologies and the co-production of public goods: interactivity and participation in the construction of Open Educational Resources. Mafra, L.A.S, Gozzi, W.P., Santos, A.G.S., Silva, L.E., Schneedorf, J.M. In: Multidisciplinary Approaches in Digital Culture. Edited by Costa, C.T.O.P. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).


## Article

- Schneedorf, J.M. JSPlotly: an application for interactive graphics in Biochemistry for HTML viewers. Journal of Biochemistry Teaching. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Living books: a proposal for reproducible teaching with R & Rstudio. Casa de Makunaima Electronic Journal. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Bioquanti, an interactive website for teaching and learning biochemistry. Journal of Biochemistry Teaching 21.1 (2023): 110-124.

## Software

- Macedo, J.A.; Matos, N.; Paula, M.M.V.; Silva, L.E.; Schneedorf, J.M. SISMA: Autocatalytic Map System. Computer Program. INPI Registration No. 08869-3 (May 19, 2008).

- Schneedorf, J.M. JSPlotly: portable simulator for interactive and dynamic graphics (2025). CC-BY-NC-SA.

## Custom GPT

- Schneedorf, J.M. GSPlotly: interactive script generator for JSPlotly. Customized OpenAI GPT. Available at: https://chat.openai.com/g/g-6819fbb8d2d08191bf7d50a3dbeadb0d-gsplotly. Accessed on: May 11, 2025.
